UtmSettings: FixUtmIcsOutlookSupport
Variations: name=Enabled, value=true, description=Enables new compatible .ics file formatting for canceled time off requests, ensuring successful event removal and error-free calendar updates in the new Outlook app for Windows.; name=Disabled, value=false, description=Retains legacy .ics file generation behavior. Canceled time off requests and partial-day events may not display or import correctly in the new Windows Outlook App.

Description: Controls whether COM object release calls inside Finally blocks are wrapped in a Try/Catch to prevent silent abort — avoiding abandoned mutexes, orphaned PROCESSLOCK rows, and COM reference leaks. UtmSettings: FixUtmSilentFinallyAbort
Variations: name=Enabled, value=true, description=COM object release calls inside Finally blocks are wrapped in a Try/Catch, ensuring ExecuteMutex is always released, LogProcessComplete always closes the PROCESSLOCK row, and GC_DLL always cleans up the COM reference.; name=Disabled, value=false, description=COM object release calls inside Finally blocks are not wrapped in a Try/Catch — an exception from releaseall() silently aborts the Finally, leaving ExecuteMutex abandoned, PROCESSLOCK rows unclosed, and COM references leaked.
